description_long: This object consists of three distinct perfume bottles, each with a unique geometric design and vibrant coloration. The first bottle features a hexagonal, honeycomb-like structure with amber liquid inside and a small, faceted brown cap. The second bottle is a double-sphere shape, filled with a deep purple liquid and topped with a round, reddish cap. The third bottle is a rectangular prism with rounded edges, containing a magenta liquid and sealed with a cork-like brown stopper; it also has a gold label on its front. All bottles are made of translucent glass, allowing the colored liquids to be visible, and each cap appears to be removable. The surfaces of the bottles are slightly matte, with some visible texture, and the overall style is whimsical and decorative. These bottles could be found as luxury items on a vanity, in a boutique, or as lost objects on an urban sidewalk.
description: A set of three decorative glass perfume bottles, each with distinct geometric shapes and vibrant colored liquids. The bottles feature removable caps and a mix of amber, purple, and magenta hues.
description_view_0: Three bottles are visible: a hexagonal amber bottle, a double-sphere purple bottle, and a rectangular magenta bottle with a gold label, all with their caps facing forward.
description_view_1: The magenta rectangular bottle and the double-sphere purple bottle are most prominent, with the hexagonal bottle partially obscured behind.
description_view_2: The gold-labeled magenta bottle is in the foreground, with the double-sphere and hexagonal bottles behind, showing more of their side profiles.
description_view_3: The double-sphere purple bottle and the hexagonal amber bottle are most visible, with the magenta bottle mostly hidden from view.
attribute_brand_logo: A gold rectangular label is visible on the front of the magenta bottle, but no clear brand logo or recognizable text is present.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: Each bottle has a distinct cap: the hexagonal bottle has a small, faceted brown cap; the double-sphere bottle has a round, reddish cap; the magenta bottle has a cork-like brown stopper. All caps appear removable and are simple in design, with a matte, slightly rough texture.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The group includes a hexagonal silhouette, a double-sphere (stacked circles) silhouette, and a rectangular prism with rounded edges. Each bottle has a unique, geometric outline.
attribute_decorative_elements: gold rectangular label on magenta bottle
